tasks.title: [R11-6.D.1] Run targeted Phase 6 verification and full suite
tasks.description:
Phase: Revision 11 — Skill-Based Agent Surface
Gate/Stream: Stream D
Duration: 1.0
Dependencies: R11-6.A.3, R11-6.B.5, R11-6.C.3

Detail:
Run targeted Phase 6 command and doc-contract tests, then run npm test; fix failures attributable to Phase 6.
tasks.author: Codex
tasks.implementation_notes: Targeted Phase 6 command/doc-contract slice passed: command-foundation, alignment-complete, alignment-complete command, migrate command, active-command-docs, and progress-bookkeeping. npm test was run; unrelated failures remained in tests/revision-11/stream-a/reference-mirrors.test.ts, tests/revision-11/stream-b/local-skill-install.test.ts, tests/e2e/doctor-snapshot-import.test.ts, tests/e2e/board-spa.test.ts, tests/revision-1/stream-b/command-help-metadata.test.ts, and tests/phase-4/stream-a/packaged-artifact-smoke.test.ts. npm run release:pack:verify passed. docs/srs.md activated MAS-211 and MAS-212, and docs/project-progress.md recorded the Revision 11 Phase 6 completion state.

tasks.title: [R11-6.D.3] Update SRS and project progress
tasks.description:
Phase: Revision 11 — Skill-Based Agent Surface
Gate/Stream: Stream D
Duration: 0.5
Dependencies: R11-6.D.2

Detail:
Update docs/srs.md to activate MAS-211 and MAS-212, and update docs/project-progress.md to mark Revision 11 Phase 6 complete with command behavior and verification evidence.
tasks.author: Codex
tasks.implementation_notes: docs/srs.md now activates MAS-211 and MAS-212 with phase-6 completion change-log entries. docs/project-progress.md records the Revision 11 completion state, targeted Phase 6 verification, npm test evidence, and release-pack verification evidence. tests/revision-11/phase-5/progress-bookkeeping.test.ts was updated to enforce the new post-completion contract.

tasks.title: [R11-6.D.2] Run release pack verification
tasks.description:
Phase: Revision 11 — Skill-Based Agent Surface
Gate/Stream: Stream D

Detail:

tasks.author: Codex
tasks.implementation_notes: npm run release:pack:verify passed after the Phase 6 docs and bookkeeping updates.
